category_sources: source_facts.description: UNIX-cal-like tool to display Jalali calendar; official Savannah page describes a library and terminal tools for Jalali Calendar.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives jcal; source_facts.executables include jcal and jdate.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage identifies the Savannah project; official nongnu.org project page links documentation and jcal/jdate manual pages.
repo_sources: Official Savannah project source page lists anonymous Git clone URL https://git.savannah.nongnu.org/git/jcal.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official project page identify Jalali calendar command-line tools.
